description: Product Description deAO Police Costume Set with Hat, Toy Shotgun, Toy Grenade, Police Accessories - Great for Kids POLICE FUN! Do you have a child that loves to dress up? Why not add to their collection with this fantastic Police Costume play set. Not only can your child pretend to be a policeman, but they even have enough equipment to do so! With a variety of police accessories and a portable storage bag included– this play set has everything your child will love! The wakie takie comes with real siren sounds and the flashlight is real! Ideal present for every child! Features: • Made with safe, washable and durable materials. • Portable and fashionable storage backpack. • A variety of fantastic accessories. • Realistic designs. • The walkie talkie comes with a sound. Contents: · 1x police vest · 1x police hat · 1x storage bag · 1x pair of toy handcuffs with keys · 1x walkie talkie · 1x baton · 1x flashlight · 1x toy gun · 1x police badges Measures: · Vest: 46 x 39 cm · Hat: 21 x 14 x 7 cm · Please note; sizing of accessories will vary depending on item. Recommendations & Warnings: · Choking hazard due to small parts. · Not suitable for children under 6 years. · To be used under direct adult supervision.
